name: kaizen-lite
description: Recall and save Kaizen guidelines in Codex without MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Recall and save reusable Kaizen guidelines.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight Codex plugin that helps you save reusable guidelines from successful sessions and recall them automatically on new prompts.
defaultPrompt: Recall Kaizen guidelines for this task.
Save new Kaizen learnings from this session.
Show me the guidelines stored for this repo.
